name: Pork Tenderloin W/Apple & Onion
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown the pork on all sides in a skillet or oven-safe pan. Use one 3-pound roast or two 1-1/2 pound roasts.
2. Remove the meat and place it in a roasting pan with a close-fitting lid.
3. In the same pan, sauté the onions and garlic for 5 minutes.
4. Add the apples and continue sautéing for about 2 more minutes.
5. Pour in the broth, vinegar, and honey; stir until well combined.
6. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
7. Pour the gravy over the pork and cover with foil.
8. Bake at 325°F for 1 to 1-1/2 hours or until the pork is cooked through.
9. Remove the pork from the pan and let rest for 10 minutes before carving.
10. Gently mash the remaining gravy and serve.
